title: String Instruments
editorialSummary: Four families of string instrument by playing mechanism — bowed, plucked, struck, keyboard-plucked. False trail: the Clavichord looks like a keyboard instrument but its strings are struck by tangents, not plucked — it belongs with Dulcimer and Hammered Dulcimer, not with Harpsichord.

meta.gptRationale: Instrument families are understandable, but distinguishing struck from keyboard-plucked demands more music-history knowledge than average.
